title: ⚠️ NeroFlix Announcement
message:
⚠️ Important Notice

NeroFlix is strictly FREE and NOT FOR SALE.

If someone has sold this app to you or is asking for payment to download or use it, please be aware that they are NOT authorized to do so.

Kindly report the seller to our official Facebook page: Nero TV.

Thank you for helping us protect the community and keep NeroFlix free for everyone. ❤️
